h1209853fg99fag462ega235ge240aa69ec7f: Well don't you cut a fine figure. Want your portrait done?
ha5daf0a1ge08ag41dega3a8gfc1de04198b8: If you have the gold, my pet artist will make you a most heroical likeness.
hbe86c16dg7bb3g4968ga6bbga5ddb1185aa0: It's not the art I want to buy - it's the artist.
hd0f573d4g6253g43efga413gc4b38e684645: He's not a pet, he's a prisoner - let him go.
h01441ddag868bg438ega625g217e9f1da417: Let's say we're his patrons, yeah? Found him wandering the wilds alone.
h03d86b13g98e6g4338g8b77gdb2b1a4e4dd4: He needs protection. And if his paintings cover our costs - so much the better, eh?
hfe0ec27bg2208g42d4g9984g1ee41228c7e4: 'Protection'. It sounds a bit more like kidnapping.
hefdfa212gcb33g42b1ga00fg5bc20f45d168: You looking to buy him? I'm open to offers, mate. Threats, not so much.
h39fa22f8gdd17g42c4g96e0gadc6b9f2ac8e: Fine, I'll buy him. How much?
h3993b466g86c7g4dbdgbcb9g35c2e5bd1006: We can skip threats and go straight to blades, if you like.
h021bd3bcg3871g4d57ga2d0ga7ce25e50f98: All right mate, all right - no need to get arsey about it.
h5569a9f6g70f6g43cfg9da0g59ae9d83c1cd: Take the moany bastard, if he means that much to ya. Doubt his crap would sell anyway.
hb522b05ag6c15g42bbgb043g7a0ff9ea3efc: Look, mate - this don't have to get violent, right? You want him, pay for him.
h84288702g319ag4ac2ga4ccgec0d462cd638: If he's as talented as you say, someone will be looking for him.
h35139698g1306g48b8gb3d7g23e73180b827: These artsy tossers always have friends in high places. That's why they're valuable.
h3c5f0abfg32c2g43eega06ag32a40365daa0: But... aye. Might be we've drawn enough attention to this place.
he3146ce5g94b9g4ed4g8526ge3823f58788b: I expect so. And whoever wants him had best bring a heap of coin.
h94087d4dgc0d3g4c9cg911bg690124f885a1: Here's my offer: give me your slave, or become mine.
hcce4c750g41d8g41b7g9de0ge3ca9d870c03: Hey - I was just looking to make a little coin. Ain't after a mess.
h1ac588c5g1cb5g4171g97e1g39d7b030eeaa: Counter-offer. Come back with coin, and I'll pretend you're as scary as you think you are.
he576f2d4g6923g459dgae30gcaa36073641b: Art's more valuable once the creator is dead. I can arrange that.
h33f3fe78g02b6g4d73g8fa0gefeb8f8ca93f: What, kill him and the price of his drawings goes up? Bloody clever, that.
h198702e4g87a8g4976gbaeeg4da3d5e16747: Go on, then - but don't kill him here. He's going to be a bleater, I know it.
h22ae58feg8887g4c6dg8d1cg0993d3693f9e: What, reckon I can't deal with him myself? It's not a bad idea, mind...
haa9a94bdga6beg47aegba23g9111cfd750b4: But we've gabbed enough. You got something to trade or what?
h261f9edcgc42dg4a45gb5ddg6608c9bdfb7b: Forget the artist - do you have anything else to trade?
h34995c48g96ebg4eddga137g912c29c4f054: Sounds fair. I'll take a portrait, then.
hbf619155g9d33g4e5bg9dd4g1a7d29343b92: Do you have anything else to trade?
h2e6a53f4g5db4g496ega9acg083086e5d0df: Of course. Got some interesting stock for a friend of the family.
hf38e10b2g9494g4505g9577g7ed6fd061092: Plenty, if the finer things don't appeal.
h53736c2fgaa91g416fg8905ga61f423e76e0: Can't show you the good stuff till Zarys gives the say-so, mind. Friends of the Zhent only.
heaa53919gfc66g4f9bga6bfg9e3f23452c8f: I do cut a fine figure. I'll take one.
h217df879gb0e4g4000gaf50gbdf816930e26: You've got an eye for quality. Every noble in Baldur's Gate will be after one of these.
h8c5a2a70g294cg4f62ga2fcge26020253489: Tell him I sent you - and if he stains it up with his sniffling, there'll be hell to pay.
h48f35f65gb1d2g4b20g91bdgf28285ebeb25: No, thanks - I just want to trade.
h60077707g7c62g4a47gb58ag945a35ca9f79: If you have the gold, my pet artist will make you a most heroical likeness. Follow the whining.
hcb1ccfebgc47eg4ae7g81f3g670f341c54ab: Well now! If we're talking, my guess is you've got coin to spend.
hcfb762fagea62g4e49g9b16g5accf28b391e: I'm here to buy your prisoner.
he1480f1dg1621g47acgb145g1b7c7fce89b5: I doubt you've got that kinda dosh lying about. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
h3273bc63g12f6g44bdgaf59g6a0b4a33f4c9: He's all yours. Don't forget to feed him - he bawls something proper.
ha00521b2g9d37g4b06g9db4g56915be1e097: Been there, mate. Come back when you've coin, and we can talk, eh?
hc57ae0a2gad63g4061g9628gfb902cd690a2: I don't have that kind of money.
h8d72b348g0084g4b59g9ed3g9c1c1dc83327: You're insane if you think I'm going to pay that much.
hd0556a5fg6d69g4e07gb369gbc9ab9842110: All right, so maybe I was fishing. No fooling you. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_2_463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca])
h5096684ag64bdg4fd1ga77fgdef46cdb0044:
Aye, off my rocker me - so you'd best not push me too far, eh? Price is the price. 
([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54])
hbc9646eag2cd7g4139g891agd82ea9b12e25: I don't have that much gold. I have plenty of steel, though.
h73034636g7ee5g4fd5gb3e8gb9f86b9a7201: All right mate, all right. Waukeen's clipped coins, there's no need to get arsey.
hde540040ge1b6g459eg8c7bg93856dbb66bf: Go on then. But anything lower would be criminal. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_2_463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca])
h081f556fg1a3bg4e93gb690g9ada21c325e8: Oh? More steel than the entire Zhentarim? Cos that's who you're crossing if you try to scab me on a deal.
h5ae34e14ge7cag40e6g8db4g408a25924e78: The price is the price. Pay up or get lost.
h847a13e4g68a3g40c0g9f16g74c3f69a8644: Then it's the same price I gave you before. No more haggling. ([GEN_CheckMagicPocketGold_2_463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca])
ha4d194cfg4535g4b0fg8558g3e6c3f722fee: I don't have that kind of money.
hfd5bce11g457ag407bg9186g7b7db76c1d3b: Something I can help you with?
h73e20eb3g218cg4b2cga78dg472c75d0bc04: Something I can help you with?
